title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.020.0) Update
description:
Software 6.A.020.0 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • A bug that was causing the hotspot/tethering not to work when used in combination with some VPNs has been corrected.
Other improvements
  • WPA3 encryption has been enabled for Wi-Fi connections.
  • Camera and overall stability of the system have been improved.
  • Security patch level: 5th of August, 2023

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.
